action: Resolve and prove the actual Cloudflare Pages hostname and deployment.
selection_basis: C-001 remains the highest-priority cloudflare_research item. External credentials still block deployment, so this run closed the highest-value internal evidence-finalization gap without changing the canonical queue.
durable_improvement: The finalizer now rereads and independently verifies the retained hostname-authority consistency artifact before constructing the deployment evidence manifest, and fails closed when that file is missing, unreadable, or structurally invalid.
verification: Seven deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical verifier and test source. The new cases verify exact retained-file reading and fail-closed behavior when the retained artifact is missing.

deployment_status.reason: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN were not available to this run.
deployment_status.claim_ceiling: committed source behavior and deterministic isolated tests only

privacy_boundary: No credential values, private chat, personal health material, diagnosis, or treatment claim was published.
canonical_queue_update_policy: Append-only team-owned update; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
remaining: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment credentials.
Retain Cloudflare's provider-returned deployment identity and resolving HTTPS URL.
Verify the served research surface and exact deployed commit through the final evidence pipeline.
next_action: Execute the authenticated workflow and inspect the retained hostname consistency verification embedded in finalizer output before changing C-001 status.
